title: Greek Rice
compiled_truth: Greek Rice is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-09 to 2002-01-09), Greek Rice sent 5 and received 144 emails, totalling 149 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (3), [Mark Mcconnell](people/mark-mcconnell) (2), [James Saunders](people/james-saunders) (1).
